events.title: FHIR R4 Healthcare Scheduling via Medplum + Epic
events.valueProposition: Transform healthcare scheduling with AI agents that book appointments directly in Epic EMR during voice conversations—no human intervention needed for routine bookings.
events.description: Healthcare appointment scheduling via a clean FHIR R4 interface backed by Medplum, with optional Epic STU3 proxy for production EMR write-back.
events.problemStatement: Healthcare providers lose 15-20% of appointments to no-shows. Patients call to book/reschedule but face long hold times. Staff spend hours on manual scheduling instead of patient care. AI agents that can't write to EMR create handoffs that delay care.
events.solutionOverview: Kira's AI agents now have full read/write access to Epic and other EMR systems via FHIR R4. During a voice call, the AI can check real-time availability, book appointments, send confirmations, and even handle rescheduling—all without human intervention.
highlights: AI agents book appointments directly in Epic during voice calls
Multi-channel scheduling: voice, web chat, SMS
Support for Cerner, Athena, and other EMR systems

architecture.description: Built on Cloudflare Workers with FHIR R4 facade pattern. Medplum provides the FHIR server with Epic STU3 proxy for systems not yet on R4. Voice pipeline uses WebSocket streaming with sub-300ms latency.

technicalHighlights: Epic STU3 to R4 bidirectional mapping

customerQuotes.quote: We went from 40 no-shows per day to 12. The AI handles 80% of scheduling calls without our staff touching them.
customerQuotes.author: Dr. Jennifer Walsh

events.migrationGuide: Requires FHIR endpoint configuration. Epic customers need MyChart integration enabled. Migration typically takes 2-3 business days with our implementation team.
breakingChanges: HL7 v2 interface deprecated (migration path available)

events.title: Neural Observability & Real-time Voice Debugging
events.valueProposition: Debug voice AI conversations in real-time with complete conversation reconstruction, neural attention visualization, and automated anomaly detection.
events.description: Comprehensive observability platform with real-time voice call debugging, conversation reconstruction, and neural network analysis.
events.problemStatement: Voice AI failures are notoriously hard to debug. When a call goes wrong, engineers have to piece together logs from 5+ systems. By the time they identify the issue, the customer has already hung up frustrated.
events.solutionOverview: Neural Observability captures every millisecond of a voice call—audio streams, AI decisions, latency spikes, sentiment shifts—and reconstructs the entire conversation in a visual timeline. Engineers can debug live calls or replay historical ones with full context.
highlights: Real-time voice call streaming and reconstruction

architecture.description: Built on Cloudflare's edge with Durable Objects for stateful session capture. Streams audio, transcripts, and AI decisions in real-time to the observability dashboard. Uses WebRTC for low-latency streaming.

technicalHighlights: Neural attention heatmaps for each conversation turn
Export to Zipkin/Jaeger for distributed tracing

customerQuotes.quote: We caught a latency spike affecting 200 calls and fixed it in 8 minutes. Before Neural Observability, we wouldn't have even known until the next day.
customerQuotes.author: Marcus Chen

events.migrationGuide: No breaking changes. Observability is automatically enabled for all voice calls. Dashboard access requires new permission scope.

events.title: AI-Native Livechat & Voice Pipeline Maturity
events.valueProposition: Transform your contact center with AI agents that handle 60% of inquiries autonomously while seamlessly escalating complex issues to human agents with full context.
events.description: Full contact center with AI seats, approvals, learning memory, and PTC baseline. 100+ voice fixes for production readiness.
events.problemStatement: Traditional contact centers face overwhelming ticket volumes during peak periods, leading to long wait times, agent burnout, and poor customer satisfaction. Hiring seasonal staff is expensive and training takes weeks.
events.solutionOverview: AI-Native Livechat introduces intelligent AI seats that autonomously handle routine inquiries, smart routing that matches customers to the best-suited agents, and PTC (Permission to Contact) compliance automation.
highlights: AI-native seats with team inboxes and saved views
Seat approval policies and AI learning memory
Voice pipeline hardening: barge-in, latency, failover

businessImpact.description: AI seats cost 70% less than human

architecture.description: Built on Cloudflare Durable Objects with real-time WebSocket connections. Features a multi-tier AI escalation system with learning memory that improves from every interaction.

technicalHighlights: Real-time sentiment analysis with escalation triggers

customerQuotes.quote: Kira transformed our peak season operations. We handled 3x volume without adding headcount, and our team actually had better work-life balance.
customerQuotes.author: Sarah Chen

events.migrationGuide: Can be enabled per-channel. Existing conversations automatically migrate. AI training requires 2 weeks of historical data.
breakingChanges: Legacy chat widget API v1 deprecated

events.title: Campaign Dry-Run Validation & Voice Quality Hardening
events.valueProposition: Launch campaigns with confidence using pre-flight validation that catches configuration errors before they cost you money.
events.description: Campaign pre-launch validation with server-side checks. 6 voice quality fixes including echo suppression overhaul.
events.problemStatement: Campaigns launched with incorrect configurations wasted thousands of dollars on failed calls. Voice quality issues like echo and latency spikes hurt brand perception.
events.solutionOverview: Dry-run validation simulates campaigns before launch, checking phone numbers, DNC compliance, agent configs, and voice quality. The new echo suppression system uses AI to eliminate feedback loops.
highlights: Echo suppression and TTS pacing improvements

architecture.description: Validation service runs pre-flight checks using the same infrastructure as production. Echo suppression uses adaptive filtering with AI-powered noise cancellation.

technicalHighlights: Sub-second validation for campaigns up to 1M contacts

customerQuotes.quote: The validation caught a DNC list error that would have cost us $50K in fines. Best feature we didn't know we needed.
customerQuotes.author: Robert Kim

events.migrationGuide: Validation is automatic for new campaigns. Existing campaigns can be re-validated. Voice quality improvements apply immediately.

events.title: Provider AMD, SIP Trunk & Campaign Enhancements
events.valueProposition: Production-ready voice with answering machine detection, SIP trunk support, and enhanced compliance—handle 3x more calls without quality degradation.
events.description: Production-ready voice with answering machine detection, SIP trunk support, and enhanced campaign compliance.
events.problemStatement: Answering machines wasted 30% of agent time. SIP infrastructure was expensive and hard to manage. DNC violations risked massive fines.
events.solutionOverview: Provider-level AMD detects machines in 3 seconds vs 10+. Built-in SIP trunk management with automatic failover. Full DNC list management with audit trails.

events.title: Omni-Channel Platform & Healthcare SDOH Module
events.valueProposition: One platform for all customer conversations—12 channels, unified agent interface, and industry-specific modules for healthcare, finance, and retail.
events.description: 12-channel unified platform with vertical industry modules including healthcare SDOH screening following Healthy People 2030.
events.problemStatement: Businesses juggle 5+ different tools for customer communication. Agents switch contexts constantly. Compliance requirements vary by industry.
events.solutionOverview: Unified platform supporting 12 channels (WhatsApp, SMS, Voice, Chat, etc.) with a single agent interface. Healthcare module includes SDOH screening with 11 intervention tools.
highlights: Unified Agent Builder with 7 config tabs

events.title: Call Script Optimizer with A/B Testing
events.valueProposition: AI automatically tests and optimizes sales scripts—conversion rates improve by 68% without manual analysis.
events.description: AI-powered sales script optimization with evolutionary algorithms, A/B testing, and multi-armed bandits for conversion optimization.
events.problemStatement: Sales scripts are written once and rarely updated. Top performers have techniques that can't be replicated. A/B tests take weeks to analyze.
events.solutionOverview: AI analyzes every call outcome and automatically tests script variations. Winning variations are rolled out automatically. The system learns from every conversation.
technicalHighlights: Automated script mutation with quality guardrails

customerQuotes.quote: The AI found a script variation that improved our close rate by 23% in one week. We never would have tested that version manually.
customerQuotes.author: David Park

events.title: Campaign Wizard & Contact Management Redesign
events.valueProposition: Launch campaigns in minutes, not days—with intelligent audience targeting and DISC personality matching.
events.description: Multi-step campaign creation wizard and redesigned contact management with DISC personality profiling.
events.problemStatement: Creating campaigns required 15+ steps across 3 different tools. Audience targeting was guesswork. Contact management was a spreadsheet nightmare.
events.solutionOverview: Guided wizard walks through campaign setup with intelligent recommendations. DISC profiling matches agents to customers for better rapport.
